response:
Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
Model training is conducted on-premises or in the cloud, with data preprocessing and model tuning performed before deployment. *  
Data security is paramount, with AWS offering encryption and access controls to protect sensitive information. * * *  
Model deployment involves packaging the model and dependencies, then deploying it on AWS services like SageMaker or EC2. *  
Overfitting can occur if the model is too complex or the training data is insufficient, requiring regularization techniques and validation. *  
AWS provides tools like XGBoost and TensorFlow to manage model performance and security. * * *
